final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing children's picture book illustration of a forest scene with a concert (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a children's picture book aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include cute small animals performing a concert: a rabbit playing the cello, a squirrel playing the flute
Scene/backdrop: must include a fairytale forest setting with mushroom houses and a rainbow
Lighting/mood: needs a cheerful, whimsical atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bright and vivid direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
